name: 剪贴板炼金术
description: 热键触发→剪贴板智能路由: URL展开取标题/监管文号→deadline追踪/其余原文返回

steps.description: 类型检测+URL展开+取标题(自带管线)

steps.args: -c 'C=$(pbpaste); if echo "$C"|grep -qE "〔20[0-9]{2}〕[0-9]+号"; then bash ~/.myagents/projects/mino/.claude/skills/macos-automation/scripts/mac-regulatory-deadline.sh --add "$C"; osascript -e "display notification \"文号已入监管追踪\" with title \"炼金\""; fi'
